package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for savepoint_or_nested_tx_logic_scattered_without_dedicated_helper: Nested transaction or savepoint control scattered across services and repositories.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule160NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule160NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule160NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario160Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule160NegativeService, input Rule160NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
